\tzpentry{ID4942}{Field Strength Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4942 introduces Field Strength Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} F_p = \frac{3}{4\pi^2} \left(\frac{\lambda}{n}\right)^3 \frac{Q}{V} \otimes \text{kissingNumber} \end{equation}
